    V

    validate(ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.instructions.AdditionInstruction
    Ensures that the instruction contains at least one OperandConcept.RESULT operand.
    validate(ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.instructions.DivisionInstruction
    Ensures that the instruction contains at least one OperandConcept.RESULT operand.
    validate(ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.instructions.MultiplicationInstruction
    Ensures that the instruction contains at least one OperandConcept.RESULT operand.
    validate(ICompiledOperand[]) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.instructions.SubtractionInstruction
    Ensures that the instruction contains at least one OperandConcept.RESULT operand.
